content.text: [attr~="token"] matches one whitespace-separated token. [lang|="es"] matches es or values beginning es-. These are not arbitrary substring checks. Optional i and s modifiers control ASCII case sensitivity where supported and appropriate. The value model must match how the attribute is defined and authored. Apply it to multilingual shift classification selector review.
